image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Some species punch above their weight — remove them and ecosystems unravel.
Context visual: These are called keystone species, vital to their habitats’ health.
Escalation visual: Take the sea otter; without it, urchin populations explode and kelp forests vanish.
Evidence visual: Or consider wolves in Yellowstone. Their presence balances elk populations, promoting plant diversity.
Payoff visual: Removing keystone species can lead to domino effects, collapsing entire ecosystems.
Pattern Interrupt visual: But it’s not just about animals. Plants can be keystone too. Think of the mighty fig tree, supporting countless species.
Cta visual: Curious about more ecological wonders? Hit that follow button!
